ddls:
CREATE TABLE "work_trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work trip */,
  "origin_region" TEXT /* Region where the trip originates */,
  "destination_region" TEXT /* Region where the trip ends */,
  "model" INTEGER /* Model number associated with the trip */,
  "survey" REAL /* Survey data associated with the trip */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trip (e.g., DuPage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trip */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the trip */,
  "portion" REAL /* Portion of trips to the destination region */,
  "trip_date" TEXT /* Date of the trip */,
  "trip_time" TEXT /* Time of the trip */,
  "trip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in miles */,
  "carpool_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the carpool, if applicable */,
  "public_transit_route" TEXT /* Specific public transit route used, if applicable */,
  "biking_distance" REAL /* Distance covered by biking, if applicable */,
  "walking_distance" REAL /* Distance covered by walking, if applicable */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip (e.g., work, school, leisure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_trips_origin_region FOREIGN KEY ("origin_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_trips_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_trips_destination_region FOREIGN KEY ("destination_region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_trips_survey FOREIGN KEY ("survey") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_trips_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., DuPage, Kane) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county within the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_sqmi" REAL /* Area of the region in square miles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_number" INTEGER /* Model number associated with the trip */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_number" REAL /* Survey number associated with the trip */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used to conduct the survey (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transport_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation mode (e.g., Car, Public Transit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transport mode record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transport mode record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the population */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the demographic group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the population group */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Average household size in the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_modes" (
  "trip_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip mode record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work trip */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation mode */,
  "mode_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the transportation mode usage */,
  "mode_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the transportation mode usage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip mode record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trip mode record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_modes_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES transport_modes ("mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_modes_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES work_trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the work trip being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the work trip data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the work trip data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES work_trips ("trip_id")
)
